message:
feat(fsfs): add lifecycle management, signal handling, mount detection, and concurrency primitives

Expand frankensearch-fast-search with daemon lifecycle management,
graceful signal handling, network filesystem detection, and canonical
lock ordering for pipeline resources.

concurrency.rs (new):
- Define canonical lock ordering convention (Catalog > Queue > Cache >
  Segment > Writer > Fusion) with guard enforcement
- Contention policy and crash-recovery primitives for pipeline resources

lifecycle.rs (new):
- Daemon lifecycle phases with PID file locking
- Subsystem health tracking and watchdog supervision
- Resource limits enforcement and machine-readable status reporting

mount_info.rs (new):
- Classify mounted filesystems (Local, NFS, SSHFS, FUSE, CIFS, etc.)
- Provide per-mount discovery policies and edge-case handling for
  network filesystems with high-latency or missing stat support

shutdown.rs (new):
- Graceful signal handling via signal-hook crate for SIGTERM, SIGINT,
  SIGHUP, and SIGQUIT
- Staged shutdown logic: SIGTERM triggers graceful drain, second SIGINT
  within 3s forces immediate exit

config.rs:
- Major expansion (~855 new lines) adding configuration types for all
  fsfs subsystems including crawler, indexer, pressure control, and
  policy parameters

cli.rs:
- Refactor command_explicit: bool to CommandSource enum for semantic
  clarity on how the command was determined
- Add support for explicit -- separator before search queries
- Add is_known_cli_flag() helper for better flag validation

main.rs:
- Integrate signal handling and lifecycle management into startup

runtime.rs:
- Expand runtime with lifecycle integration (~212 new lines)

lib.rs:
- Export concurrency, lifecycle, mount_info, and shutdown modules

Cargo.toml:
- Add signal-hook = "0.3" dependency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
